indicators.name: glass walkway
indicators.rationale: Glass walkway is unsafe and uncomfortable for sleep.

indicators.name: high ceiling
indicators.rationale: High ceiling can cause noise and drafts.

indicators.name: blue lighting
indicators.rationale: Blue lighting is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: no bed or furniture
indicators.rationale: No bed or furniture makes it impossible to sleep.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The glass walkway, high ceiling, blue lighting, and lack of furniture make it unsuitable for sleep.
